name: 2903 JEFFERSON_PHASE ONE. (RCC stamped).pdf
description: Phase One encompasses work required to make the facilities ready for a new congregation. This includes an overhaul of the mechanical systems serving the Educational Building and Gym/Fellowship Hall including both modified and entirely new systems. In addition to accounting for the power needs of new mechanical systems, the electrical scope includes swapping out existing light fixtures with new fixtures in the same location and providing new lighting and outlets to support services hosted in the Fellowship Hall. Plumbing upgrades include the relocation of an existing laundry room and the addition of two small restrooms in an area prior utilized as storage.
